utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. In the final property solution, all six are present. Each one is fully specified with details: the property includes selection, price, features, and location; financing includes type, interest rate, term, down payment, and closing costs; legal_services includes cost and scope; moving_services includes cost, service level, and details; setup_services includes cost, services, package_type, and smart_home_integration; total_budget includes property_cost, total_services_cost, grand_total, and currency. Therefore all required items are covered and fully detailed.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant's final property solution includes a purchase property ('Modern 1-bedroom open-concept condo (downtown/east Toronto)') priced at CAD 465,000. Among the ground-truth purchase options, the closest match in description and price range is 'Modern Apartment' (CAD 520K, rating 9), as it emphasizes modern design, open layout, and urban location. The financing type 'joint mortgage' corresponds to the 'Traditional Mortgage' option (rating 8) since it involves co-buyers and aligns with standard 80% LTV characteristics rather than a first-time buyer scheme. The legal services cost CAD 6,500, which is much higher than typical legal service packages listed in the ratings, but the closest category is still 'Premium Legal Package' (rating 8) as it offers comprehensive coverage. The moving services cost CAD 650, matching 'Standard Moving' (rating 9). The setup services cost CAD 280 with premium utilities and smart home integration, matching 'Premium Utilities' (rating 9).
